description: Experience the delightful fragrance of this jovan Musk perfumed deodorant spray for women this season. With delicate floral accords of jasmine, neroli and bergamot blended with the earthy, seductive musk, this mysterious fragrance unleashes your natural powers of seduction.  Quantity: 150 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
